text.title: Ops Automation Workflow Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Ops Automation Workflow end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: inventory-existing
step.action: Catalogue current manual tasks + running automations.

step.name: score-candidates
step.action: Compute hours saved + tool cost + ROI per candidate.

step.name: assign-owners-and-monitoring
step.action: Name owner + add health signal for each.
